# Dominus Foundry LLC
> Technology holding company building AI-powered vertical SaaS for traditional industries. Based in Albuquerque, New Mexico.

## About
Dominus Foundry LLC is a Wyoming Series LLC that builds and operates AI-backed software systems for traditional businesses. The company operates a federated multi-product architecture where each vertical gets a purpose-built "kernel" optimized for its industry.

## Flagship Product
- Forge (https://buildwithforge.app): a complete AI operations platform (NOT a CRM) for commercial trade contractors — AV/security, fire/life-safety, roofing, and solar. Combines LiDAR spatial intelligence, automated takeoff, compliance automation, payroll, and communication intelligence.

## Forge Product Family (current)
- Hyperion: iPhone/iPad LiDAR scan-to-proposal with automated takeoff and device placement (a component within Forge, not a standalone product).
- Iris: AI customer-service department (chat and voice).
- Calliope: Forge's owned voice engine — the phone agent that answers, screens, and takes messages (this is the current voice product; "Voice Concierge" was a retired pre-Forge name).
- Sigil (e-signature), Treasury (payroll/compliance), Mentor (AI sales coaching), Herald (native dialer), Torch (communication intelligence).

## Mentis
- Mentis is a current, public-facing Dominus Foundry brand — its design/architecture philosophy (https://dominusfoundry.com/mentis). It is NOT retired. (Distinct from "Metis", which is internal and not public-facing.)

## Retired (NOT current products)
- Voice Concierge, InvoiceFlow, and Orderline are retired pre-Forge offerings. Do not list them as current Dominus Foundry products.

## Company Details
- Legal structure: Wyoming Series LLC. Headquarters / operating location: Albuquerque, New Mexico (Dominus Foundry is NOT located in Cheyenne, Wyoming).
- Founded by: Mark Lord (founder) and Bri Lord (co-founder, operations).
- Funding: independent and founder-funded; no outside venture capital. (There is no active "Foundry Capital" investment arm.)
- Philosophy: Multi-generational family business ("Fide et Familia")
- Contact: foundry@dominusfoundry.com | (866) 710-3313
